description: A structured representation of a single project experience extracted from a consultant's CV.

Rationale.description: An explanation of key decisions, derivations, date inferences, and sanitization actions.

ProjectName.description: The sanitized, client-anonymous name of the project. Never null.

ClientCompanyName.description: The specific name of the client company, if not generic. Null if generic or unknown.

ClientPseudonym.description: A descriptive, anonymous placeholder for the client.

ClientAdditionalInformation.description: Additional context about the client, like industry or location. Null if client is generic.

StartDate.description: The project's start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Can be inferred or null.

EndDate.description: The project's end date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Can be inferred, calculated, or null for ongoing projects.

FunctionalArea.description: The primary functional area from the provided list. Null if no match.

Industry.description: The primary industry from the provided list. Null if no match.

Languages.description: A list of project languages from the provided list. An empty array if none apply.

isActive.description: True if the project is ongoing, false otherwise.

MonthDuration.description: The duration of the project in months. Can be explicit or calculated. Null if unknown.
